text:
The Kute Gang of Thieves (, Kūto Tōzoku-dan) was a group of bandits. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 7 

Background

At some point, Ging Freecss annihilated the Kute Gang of Thieves. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

In a flashback involving Kite and a younger Gon, Kite informs the boy that one of Ging's achievements was the annihilation of the Kute Gang of Thieves. 

Trivia

The original Japanese name of the gang, クート (Kūto), could be kind of a joke as the name is homophonous to the English word "coot" read with Japanese phonemes.

Anime and Manga Differences

The Kute Gang of Thieves is not mentioned in the 2011 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 76 (2011)
